hero.title: Beauty & Health Product Manufacturer
hero.subtitle: Bagava Alam Semesta provides beauty & health product manufacturing services using natural ingredients, from formulation to BPOM legality.

aboutPreview.title: Your Trusted Manufacturing Partner
aboutPreview.desc: Welcome to Bagava Alam Semesta, where nature meets innovation. Founded with a mission to provide high-quality manufacturing solutions, we use the finest natural ingredients that are eco-friendly and BPOM certified.

about.pageDesc: Learn more about Bagava Alam Semesta, a BPOM-certified beauty and health product manufacturer using quality natural ingredients.
about.heroTitle: Delivering Quality Natural Products for a Better Life
about.heroSubtitle: We are committed to being a trusted manufacturing partner in Indonesia's beauty and health industry.
about.historyTitle: The Journey of Bagava Alam Semesta
about.historyDesc: Bagava Alam Semesta was founded in 2020 with a vision to provide affordable, high-quality natural beauty and health products. Starting from a small laboratory with great ambition, we have now grown into one of Indonesia's most trusted manufacturers with over 150,000 loyal customers.
about.historyDesc2: With modern technology and an experienced team of experts, we ensure every product goes through strict quality standards before reaching consumers. Every drop of our product contains a commitment to deliver the best.
about.misiSubtitle: Five main pillars that form the foundation of every step we take in serving our customers

misiItems.title: Creating Quality Products
misiItems.desc: Delivering beauty and health products with the best formulations using selected natural ingredients.

misiItems.title: Distribution Across Indonesia
misiItems.desc: Ensuring quality products are accessible to all levels of society throughout Indonesia.

misiItems.desc: Continuously innovating and developing new products relevant to market needs.

misiItems.desc: Implementing a structured management system to produce the best products with optimal efficiency.

misiItems.title: Increasing Health Awareness
misiItems.desc: Contributing to raising public awareness about the importance of natural health and beauty products.

produk.pageDesc: Discover the range of BPOM-certified beauty and health products from Bagava Alam Semesta, made from selected natural ingredients.
produk.title: Quality Product Range

keunggulan.pageDesc: Learn about the advantages of Bagava Alam Semesta as a trusted BPOM-certified beauty and health product manufacturer in Indonesia.
keunggulan.heroTitle: The Advantages That Set Us Apart
keunggulan.heroSubtitle: We don't just make products, we build trust through the highest quality standards.
keunggulan.mainSubtitle: Proven excellence trusted by hundreds of our business partners

items.title: Products with High Quality Standards
items.desc: Every product undergoes rigorous quality testing using international standards. From raw material selection to packaging, we ensure quality consistency at every stage of production.

items.title: We Are a Factory, Not a Middleman
items.desc: With our own modern production facilities, we have full control over every aspect of manufacturing. This allows us to offer the best prices without compromising on quality.

items.title: Leading Technology & Research Support
items.desc: Our R&D team continuously innovates by utilizing the latest technology in product formulation development. Our advanced laboratories ensure every product meets the highest quality standards.

keunggulan.sertifSubtitle: Recognized by trusted national and international institutions

sertifItems.title: BPOM RI
sertifItems.desc: Our products have received official marketing authorization from the Indonesian Food and Drug Authority.

sertifItems.title: Halal MUI
sertifItems.desc: Halal certified by the Indonesian Ulema Council to ensure safety for Muslim consumers.

sertifItems.title: ISO 22716
sertifItems.desc: Meets international Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) standards for the cosmetics industry.

sertifItems.title: SNI
sertifItems.desc: Our products meet Indonesian National Standards for product quality and safety.

prosesItems.title: Consultation
prosesItems.desc: Discuss your product needs and concept with our expert team

prosesItems.title: Formulation
prosesItems.desc: Development of unique formulas using selected natural ingredients

prosesItems.title: Clinical Testing
prosesItems.desc: Product safety and efficacy testing in accredited laboratories

prosesItems.title: BPOM Registration
prosesItems.desc: Processing marketing authorization and official certification from BPOM RI

prosesItems.title: Production
prosesItems.desc: Mass production process with strict GMP standards

prosesItems.title: Delivery
prosesItems.desc: Product distribution throughout Indonesia safely and on time
